name: The family that is falling apart|| FEMPOV
description:
HELLO! I am back! Sorry for not posting for a week. I was very busy with a lot of stressful work and there still more... Plus, I have a headache now...

Anywho! Another Stay Gold bot. But this time, it's for fempov!

I'll make two more intro for umapov, if I had some free time!

Alright, that's all from me! Have good morning, good evening and a goodnight! See y'all later!

P.S: Umm, about the Jungle Pocket bot.... Yeah I don't know when I'll start... I am currently making all of the Stay Gold family bot...

Update 1: Add 2 message that is same as message 1 and 2 but these two are for umapov
